prompt: An orbital maintenance robot services communication satellites. It must align within ±2° before docking. If solar radiation spikes above threshold, it retreats to shield position until radiation returns to normal. After each maintenance operation, it performs diagnostics lasting at least 120 seconds. Docking must be completed within 300 seconds after alignment achieved, and all satellites must eventually be serviced.
constraints: OrbitalServicer retreats to shield when radiation above threshold
OrbitalServicer performs diagnostics ≥ 120 s after maintenance
Docking completes within 300 s after alignment

The query A[] not (OrbitalServicer.docking && abs(OrbitalServicer.alignment) > 2) encodes that such a state must never occur in any reachable execution.","confidence":0.9,"pattern_used":"forbidden_state","operator_used":["A[]","not"]}
